_comment: EDNY DE regression (user flight 2026-06-16, OpenAI mode): after the Tower's departure clearance the pilot reads back 'Piste 06 startfrei ...'. Whisper welds 'Start frei' into 'startfrei', so the keyword parser returns UNKNOWN/0.00 and the old pipeline looped on 'Uebermittlung gestoert, wiederholen Sie' / 'Standardphraseologie verwenden'. The deterministic readback recognition matches the utterance char-robustly against the stored clearance components (runway 06 + callsign) and accepts it as a silent READBACK. No keyword list, no LM, backend-agnostic. Driven on the ground so was_airborne stays false; readback_pending becomes true after 'Start frei'.
name: EDNY DE welded 'startfrei' departure readback recognition

say.note: Setup: prime TOWER_CONTACT so 'ready for departure' lands on the Tower template directly.
1 - Tower: ready for departure -> Start frei. readback_pending becomes true; the stored clearance components are {callsign, runway 06}.
say.text: Friedrichshafen Turm Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar am Rollhalt Piste 06 abflugbereit

say.note: 2 - Pilot reads back the welded 'Piste 06 startfrei ...'. Rule parser returns UNKNOWN; readback recognition covers callsign + runway -> silent READBACK. Must NOT loop the say-again reminder.
say.text: Piste 06 startfrei Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar
